guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 49. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_dr: Point to the big DR and say: drdrdr. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_fr: Now point to the big FR and say: frfrfr.

parent_story: A dragon beat a loud drum. A frog jumped on the dragon's tail.
